title: Anti-Drug Awareness Drive
description: Cadets of Manipal Jnanasudha participated in an Anti-Drug Awareness Drive accompanied by the Executive Officer of 6 Karnataka Naval Unit NCC, Lt Cdr M. A. Multani, to promote awareness about the harmful effects of drug abuse and encourage a drug-free society.
